# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: AWS Secret Access Key format from official AWS docs (40-char base64-like shape)
# Checksum-flip: last three chars changed to 'KEY' — shape matches but value is invalid
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential
